name: ASRock X870 NOVA WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8400+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASRock X870 NOVA WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16
description: ASRock high-end ATX motherboard with X870 chipset supporting DDR5 and Wi-Fi 7 with dual USB4.
